title: polypodium hemionitideum
intro: Polypodium hemionitideum, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. It is a type of plant used in herbal medicine, valued for its ant-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including skin conditions, such as psoriasis and eczema, and has been shown to have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Polypodium hemionitideum include extracts and capsules, which can be used to support skin health and immune function.
